scripts.text:
USE P21Import;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @ShipmentFileId uniqueidentifier='f5c975af-1d81-5d36-9ff8-244fd38c9fc5';
DECLARE @SupplierID int=40408;

;WITH issue_lines AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          i.issue_code
        , i.source_row_number
        , i.Bin_ID
        , i.Item_ID
        , i.PO_No
    FROM P21Import.dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_validation_issue AS i
    WHERE i.shipment_file_id=@ShipmentFileId
      AND i.severity='BLOCKING'
), detail AS (
    SELECT
          il.issue_code
        , il.source_row_number
        , il.Bin_ID
        , il.Item_ID
        , il.PO_No
        , supplier_inv_mast_uid = MAX(CONVERT(nvarchar(40), ivs.inv_mast_uid))
        , mapped_komar_item = MAX(ivm.item_id)
        , supplier_match_count = COUNT(DISTINCT ivs.inv_mast_uid)
        , matching_po_line_count = COUNT(DISTINCT pol_match.po_line_uid)
        , po_line_count_on_po = COUNT(DISTINCT pol_any.po_line_uid)
        , sample_po_items = STRING_AGG(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), ivm_any.item_id), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ivm_any.item_id)
    FROM issue_lines AS il
    LEFT JOIN P21Play.dbo.inventory_supplier AS ivs
      ON ivs.supplier_id=@SupplierID
     AND ivs.supplier_part_no=il.Item_ID
    LEFT JOIN P21Play.dbo.inv_mast AS ivm
      ON ivm.inv_mast_uid=ivs.inv_mast_uid
     AND ISNULL(ivm.delete_flag,'N')<>'Y'
    LEFT JOIN P21Play.dbo.po_line AS pol_match
      ON pol_match.po_no=il.PO_No
     AND pol_match.inv_mast_uid=ivm.inv_mast_uid
    LEFT JOIN P21Play.dbo.po_line AS pol_any
      ON pol_any.po_no=il.PO_No
    LEFT JOIN P21Play.dbo.inv_mast AS ivm_any
      ON ivm_any.inv_mast_uid=pol_any.inv_mast_uid
    GROUP BY il.issue_code, il.source_row_number, il.Bin_ID, il.Item_ID, il.PO_No
)
SELECT
      issue_code
    , source_row_number = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), source_row_number)
    , Bin_ID
    , Item_ID
    , PO_No
    , supplier_match_count = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), supplier_match_count)
    , supplier_inv_mast_uid
    , mapped_komar_item
    , matching_po_line_count = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), matching_po_line_count)
    , po_line_count_on_po = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_line_count_on_po)
    , sample_po_items = LEFT(sample_po_items, 500)
FROM detail
ORDER BY issue_code, PO_No, Item_ID, source_row_number;
